subject: Cloud Computing
title: Serverless Cost Benefits
description: A quick, practical guide to Serverless Cost Benefits.

hook.text: A function runs for 200 milliseconds, once per minute. Serverless charges for those 200 milliseconds only.

buildup.text: Serverless computing bills per execution, not per hour. No traffic means zero cost — the ultimate pay-as-you-go.

discovery.text: For sporadic workloads, serverless can cost 10-100x less than a running server doing the same job.

twist.text: At high volume, serverless gets expensive fast. A constantly running Lambda costs more than an EC2 instance.

climax.text: Serverless is cheapest for bursty, unpredictable traffic. For steady loads, traditional compute often wins.

punchline.text: Serverless is cheap when idle. Expensive when busy.

quiz.question: When is serverless most cost-effective?
options: For bursty, unpredictable workloads with lots of idle time
For 24/7 high-volume services with constant traffic
Only when used with reserved instance pricing
